title: Vanilla Melee Starter Path
author: TerraPath Team
summary: A tiny example guide that demonstrates TerraPath progression stages, boss references, and categorized item picks.

stages.title: First Night
stages.description: Collect basic mobility, find surface chests, and prepare a safe arena before fighting early bosses.
goals: Craft or loot a stronger melee weapon
Build a simple arena with platforms and campfires

items.note: A safe ranged melee option if you find one in surface or underground chests.
Early double jump makes boss dodging much easier.
Useful early crafting material. Lead bars can replace iron in many worlds.

notes: This is a format example, not a complete melee walkthrough.
